message:
fix(freeze): fix closure variable access via C FFI

The frozen dispatch was not correctly passing var_refs to frozen functions,
causing closures to return undefined instead of captured values.

Root cause:
- C extern declaration was missing var_refs parameter (6 args vs 7 expected)
- This caused argument misalignment where result_out was interpreted as var_refs
- Zig JSVarRef struct layout didn't match C due to GC header union alignment

Fixes:
- Add JSVarRef **var_refs to frozen_dispatch_lookup extern declaration
- Pass p->u.func.var_refs from function object at dispatch call site
- Use C FFI (js_frozen_get_var_ref/js_frozen_set_var_ref) for closure access
  to handle struct layout differences correctly

Verified: mandelbrot outputs correct checksum 8341325, fib(45) = 1134903170
